sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112515" key="fukogei/twn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῡκο-γείτων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n112515.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">near the seaweed, dwelling by the sea,</tr_> epith. of Priapus, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.193</biblScope> </bibl> (Flacc.).</sense> </entryFree>
